# Ezoic Brand Guidelines — Full Guide

Brand standards / Vol. 02 — 2026 / Light edition · experimental v0.1
Canonical surface: https://iheartezoic.com · This document is the complete machine-readable edition of the guide.

## Intro — Growth Engineering.

Ezoic's identity is light, editorial, and type-led. This guide is the source of truth for how the brand looks. Every mark in it is a master file — place the files as supplied; never re-draw, re-color, or re-type them.

Positioning: Ezoic is revenue infrastructure for the modern web — the operating layer for independent web businesses. Tagline: "Revenue infrastructure for the modern web."

## Logo

- Primary lockup — emblem left, wordmark right. File: /brand/lockup-dark.png (light surfaces).
- Reversed — ink surfaces only. File: /brand/lockup-light.png.
- The wordmark is never typeset. It is a file, placed.

## Logo On Color

Four pairings, then leave it alone:

1. Core on cloud — default.
2. Steel on cloud — quiet.
3. Reversed on ink.
4. Steel on ink — quiet reverse.

## Logo Usage — Use The Master Files.

Do:
- Place the supplied files as-is — the mark is never re-typeset, re-drawn, or approximated.
- Keep clear space equal to the emblem height — labelled x — on every side.
- Sit the mark on quiet surfaces, at full opacity, in one of the four approved pairings.

Don't:
- Never recolor outside the palette, stretch, rotate, or add shadows.
- Never place the mark on busy imagery without an approved veil, or shrink it below legibility.

Emblem finishes: Green #70A92A · Ink #252726 · Steel #969696 · On ink, the green holds.

## Color — Neutrals Build. Green Points.

| Name | Hex | Role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ezoic Green | #70A92A | The single accent — the mark, primary actions, signature moments. It earns every appearance |
| Charcoal | #252726 | Primary text; ink surfaces |
| Graphite | #575757 | Secondary text, metadata, captions |
| Steel | #969696 | Muted: quiet pairings, borders, page numbers, secondary text on ink |
| Cloud | #E3E3E3 | The page surface |

Discipline: surfaces are cloud or ink. Don't introduce new brand hues for surfaces, charts, or components — neutrals build the page; green makes the point. The previous mint-led dark system is retired. Light, always.

Dark mode is eliminated. There is no dark mode or dark theme — this is a decision, not a pending question. Ink surfaces (reversed-logo panels, full-bleed bands, the back cover) are local accents inside the light system, never a global theme. Do not build a .dark variant.

Notes: white #FFFFFF and alpha/color-mix derivatives of the five declared values are permitted only as quiet surface tints (raised panels, washes) — never as new hues. Green measures 2.8:1 on light surfaces and is never small text on cloud/white. No brand gradient exists.

## Font — Inter

- Headings — letter spacing −5% · line spacing 125%.
- Body — letter spacing −3% · line spacing 150%.
- Reddit Mono — code, file paths, hex & exact values.

## Type In Use — One Family. Two Optical Sizes.

Scale: Display 900 Black · Display 700 Bold · Display 600 SemiBold · Text 400 Regular · Mono Medium.

- Headings — Inter Display, −5% letter spacing, 125% line spacing. Title Case, closed with a period.
- Body — Inter Text, −3% letter spacing, 150% line spacing, sentence case.
- Nothing is set in all caps. Hierarchy comes from scale and spacing — not caps, not bold runs.
- Reddit Mono is reserved for code, file paths, hex, and exact values. Never decoration.
- The wordmark is never typeset. It is a file, placed.

Font files (self-hosted, /fonts): Inter Display 28pt (600/700/900), Inter Text 18pt (300–700), RedditMono-VF (variable 200–900).

## The Pixel Wash — Decisive, Concise, Clear.

The system's one texture. Neutrals only, one wash per surface, always under the content:

- Editorial collage — hero surfaces · 14%.
- Wash 01 — ink bands · 8%.
- Wash 02 — ink bands · 10%.

A wash never carries color, never crowds the mark, and never substitutes for hierarchy. Photography inside a wash is light-washed and sits quiet under the system.

## Voice — Direct. Confident. Technical.

1. Direct — say what you mean. Cut the fog. If a claim is weak, sharpen it or drop it.
2. Confident — state verified things plainly. Confidence is about truth, not volume.
3. Technical — Ezoic is revenue infrastructure for the modern web — never a generic vendor, ad network, or plugin.

Terminology:

| Term | Set as | Note |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ezoic | Ezoic | Never EZOIC or lowercase ezoic outside logo and domain contexts |
| ezID | ezID | Lowercase ez, capital ID — the identity sub-brand |
| EPMV | EPMV | All caps. Expand to "Earnings Per Thousand Visitors" on first use |
| JS snippet | JS snippet | Preferred wording for the lightweight integration |
| Open.Video | Open.Video | The period is part of the name |

## Applied Examples

- Emblem over imagery — the mark holds the frame.
- Campaign frame — one green band, one mark.
- People, light-washed — imagery sits quiet under the system.

## Layout And Surfaces

- Max content width 1320px; gutter clamp(20px, 5vw, 64px).
- Sheet rhythm: running head top-left, emblem top-right, hairline footer with mono page number.
- Rounded surfaces: 16px panels/tiles/swatches, 24px large bands, 999px pills.
- Hairlines: ink at low opacity (rgb(37 39 38 / 0.13)) on light; white at low opacity on ink.
- Motion: quiet entrance (opacity + slight rise); minimal hover (color change, line extension, arrow reveal).

## Banned Patterns

- Fake logos, fake lockups, or unapproved logo stand-ins presented as real.
- A typeset wordmark.
- Asset meaning inferred from filenames alone.
- Unsourced metrics, proof points, product claims, partner claims, customer names, or quotes.
- Decorative monospace or mono-heavy layouts.
- All-caps label systems, headings, or eyebrows.
- Any color outside the five declared values (plus documented white/alpha surface tints) — including the retired mint/lime/frog set.
- Dark-led layouts or a global dark theme — ink is a local accent; light, always.
- Gradients — no sanctioned brand gradient exists.
- More than one wash per surface, a wash over the mark, or a wash above its approved opacity.
- Grid-pattern filler, gradient blur blobs, generic SaaS card grids, heavy cards, dashboard-like brand layouts.
- Heavy bold everywhere; invented iconography; default chart palettes.
- Negative competitor-trashing.

## Assets

The v0.1 master files ship in the brand repo under brand-site/assets/:

- Core lockup — brand/lockup-dark.png (light surfaces) · Reversed — brand/lockup-light.png (ink only).
- Steel pairing masters — brand/truth-assets/UPDATE/Frame 120889.png (steel on cloud) · Frame 120891.png (steel on ink).
- Emblem — emblem-white.svg (vector master; palette finishes only) · emblem-green.png · mark-muted.png (steel).
- Wordmarks (files, never typeset) — wordmark-dark.png · wordmark-light.png. ezID sub-brand — ezid-dark.png · ezid-light.png.
- Pixel washes — overlays/overlay-hero.png (collage · 14%) · overlay-01.png (8%) · overlay-02.png (10%) · truth-assets/Frame 120903.png (cover wash).
- Applied examples — truth-assets/Frame 120905.png (emblem over ink wash) · Frame 120906.png (campaign frame).
- Fonts — assets/fonts/ (Inter Display 28pt, Inter Text 18pt, RedditMono-VF).

The live catalog at iheartezoic.com may still serve the previous set until the canonical app is refreshed from this system — until then, the repo files are the authoritative masters. Retired, do not place: emblem-mint.png, mark-mint.png, mark-lime.png, mark-frog.png (mint-era finishes); draft sheets Frame 120899.png / Frame 120894.png carry superseded values and are reference-only.

## Access

- Site: https://iheartezoic.com
- Structured JSON: https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand
- Style section: https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand/sections/style
- Assets: https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand/assets (roots: brand, design-elements, photo-backs, fonts)
- Grouped: https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand/assets/grouped
- Download: https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand/assets/download?root=all
- MCP: https://iheartezoic.com/api/mcp
- Index: https://iheartezoic.com/llms.txt

## Content Integrity / Source Notes

- Use the live asset catalog before placing logos, marks, design elements, photo backdrops, or font files.
- Use filenames as locators, not as proof of what an asset depicts or means.
- Leave claim slots empty or clearly open when a metric, customer name, partner name, quote, product fact, or outcome is not available.
- Do not invent metrics, customers, outcomes, screenshots, quotes, partners, product capabilities, or asset meanings.

Not specified in the current source set: logo min sizes, CMYK/Pantone, co-branding, iconography/illustration systems, print layout, motion/broadcast system, an approved destructive color, or a chart palette. (Dark mode is not an open question — it is eliminated.)

Conflict note: draft asset sheets carry superseded values (ink #222423; line spacing 105%/110%). The guide's written spec — ink #252726; 125%/150% — is the contract.

Copyright Ezoic 2026 — experimental draft, not ratified.
